targets.query:
from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and r._field == "aqi")
  |> group(columns: ["station_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "station_id"])

panels.title: PM2.5 và PM10 theo thời gian

targets.query:
from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and (r._field == "pm2_5" or r._field == "pm10"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["station_id", "_field"])

panels.title: Nồng độ CO / NO2 / O3 theo trạm

targets.query:
from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality" and (r._field == "co_ppm" or r._field == "no2_ppb" or r._field == "o3_ppb"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["station_id", "_field"])

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "actuator_status")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["station_id"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["station_id", "fan", "purifier", "mist", "board"])

panels.title: Số event theo cấp (severity) theo thời gian

targets.query:
from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gateway_events" and r._field == "aqi")
  |> group(columns: ["severity"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "air_quality")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "gateway_events" and (r._field == "aqi" or r._field == "action_taken"))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "station_id", "event_type", "severity"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 20)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "station_id", "event_type", "severity", "aqi", "action_taken"])
